parsed.explanation: The original XML had several structural errors: 1. In the first BIBL entry, the <TITLE> tag was incorrectly closed at the very end of the bibliographic description, swallowing the <YEAR>, <FORMAT>, and <PRIZE> tags inside it. I moved the closing </TITLE> to immediately follow the title text. 2. In the second BIBL entry, the <TITLE> tag was closed prematurely, but the subsequent descriptive text was being treated as part of the title or left dangling; I wrapped the descriptive portion in a <DESC> tag for better semantic structure. 3. The second BIBL entry had a nesting error where <FORMAT>, <YEAR>, and <PRIZE> were placed outside the <BIBL> tag but before the closing </BIBL> tag (which was actually a duplicate/misplaced closing tag). I reorganized the hierarchy so that all bibliographic metadata is contained within the <BIBL> element.
